description: ADAudit Plus is running at http://localhost:8081/ (login: admin/Admin@2024). Your threat intelligence team has flagged an ongoing brute-force credential attack targeting local Windows accounts. Investigate the audit trail to identify the specific local user account that was the primary target based on the highest number of failed logon events. Create a new technician account for the incident response team with username 'incident_handler', full name 'Incident Handler', email 'handler@corp.local', password 'Handler@2025', and role 'Operator'. Configure the system to send event collection alerts to 'security-alerts@corp.local' with a frequency of 1 hour. Document your investigation findings in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\brute_force_analysis.txt, including the name of the most heavily targeted account, the approximate number of failed login attempts observed, and your recommended response action.
